title: acer ornatum subvar. formosanum
intro: Acer ornatum subvar. formosanum, a lesser-known variety of the Acer ornatum plant, is a type of deciduous shrub native to Taiwan. It is a member of the Sapindaceae family and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Acer ornatum subvar. formosanum is often used in teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
